data.title: Hick's Law
data.description: The application's design minimizes decision time by reducing the amount of choices on-screen.
data.technical_spec: Streamlined user interface to enhance usability and satisfaction.

data.title: Gestalt Principles
data.description: Instagram utilizes Gestalt principles to ensure elements are perceived as a unified whole.
data.technical_spec: Proximity, similarity, and closure used in UI design for intuitive experience.

data.title: Fitts's Law
data.description: Interactive elements are designed for efficiency and accessibility across different device sizes.
data.technical_spec: Buttons and clickable areas are optimized for touch targets.

data.title: Miller’s Law
data.description: Content organization aids in users managing information overload by chunking data.
data.technical_spec: Information is grouped into manageable units for better processing.

data.title: Law of Common Region
data.description: UI elements are grouped together to indicate relation and improve navigability.
data.technical_spec: Boundaries and defined sections help users quickly find and interpret content.
